Items.Title: stackstream X 产品搜索 | stackstream X Product Hunt
Items.Description:
堆栈流

发表于 4 月 28 日

它可以改变你的创业公司的游戏规则，但它需要一个精心策划的战略和执行。 通过建立您的受众群体、在发布日产生影响并保持势头，您可以创造一种影响力，帮助您达到新的高度。 不久之后，stackstream 将在 Product Hunt 上推出其产品，它正准备迎接一个重要的入口。

这使开发人员能够展示他们的工作、教授编码技能并与其他开发人员协作。 它是所有与代码相关的东西的一站式商店。

这个平台很重要，因为它将开源开发的概念提升到了新的高度。 通过实时代码流，开发人员拥有一个平台来共享他们的工作并加强协作。 它通过培养希望共同学习和成长的技术社区，为新手开发人员学习新技能和深入了解经验丰富的开发人员的编码过程打开了大门。 它改变了游戏规则，简单明了。

他们正在寻求反馈、批评、鼓励以及任何其他可以帮助他们改进产品并使其更加用户友好的东西。

此次发布提醒人们社区在科技行业的力量。 这证明了协作、创新和创造力在创造满足用户需求的产品方面的重要性。 总而言之，在 Product Hunt 上推出 Stackstream 是该公司的一个重要里程碑，为技术社区提供了一个探索和了解该平台的绝佳机会。 通过引入一种全新的实时代码流和协作方法，他们有可能改变开发人员和远程团队的协作方式。

一旦暂停，stack_stream 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

解除暂停后，stack_stream 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，stack_stream 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 stack_stream 没有暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

原文:

stack_stream

Posted on Apr 28

   

Product Hunt, the go-to platform for early adopters, tech enthusiasts, and investors, can help your product gain traction and buzz. It can be a game-changer for your startup, but it requires a well-planned strategy and execution. By building your audience, making an impact on launch day, and keeping the momentum going, you can create a buzz that will help you reach new heights. Soon stackstream will launch its product on Product Hunt, and it's gearing up for a big entrance.

stackstream is a live code streaming platform that allows developers to share their coding process in real-time. This enables developers to showcase their work, teach coding skills, and collaborate with fellow developers. It is a one-stop-shop for all things code-related.

This platform matters because it takes the concept of open-source development to new heights. With live code streaming, developers have a platform to share their work and increase collaboration. It opens up doors for novice developers to learn new skills and gain insight into the coding process of experienced developers by fostering tech communities who want to learn and grow together. It is a game-changer, plain and simple.

The stackstream team is keenly aware of the importance of the Product Hunt launch, and they're pulling out all the stops to make it a success. They're seeking feedback, critiques, encouragement, and anything else that could help them improve the product and make it more user-friendly.

This launch is a reminder of the power of community in the tech industry. It's a testament to the importance of collaboration, innovation, and creativity in creating products that meet the needs of users. stackstream's success on Product Hunt will depend on the support of the community, and the company is counting on their help to propel it to new heights.

To sum up, the launch of stackstream on Product Hunt is a major milestone for the company, presenting an excellent opportunity for the tech community to explore and understand the platform. By introducing a fresh and innovative approach to live code streaming and collaboration, they have the potential to transform the way developers and remote teams collaborate.

Amplework Software - Apr 28

Items.Title: 不更换车用液体的风险 | Risks of Not Changing Vehicle Fluids
Items.Description:
拥有汽车不仅仅是获得汽车。 您的车辆不仅是您的驾驶机器，而且还是复杂机械部件的组合。 定期的车辆服务和维护可确保您的车辆保持良好状态，并使所有细节保持协调一致。 本文将讨论不更换车辆机油和液体可能带来的所有风险。

机油

机油是发动机的灵魂，没有合适的机油，机器就无法高效工作。 缺少机油会在发动机中产生巨大的摩擦和热量，并最终导致其磨损。 如果不更换机油，它会随着时间的推移而分解。 随着故障开始，水分、燃料和其他污染物会稀释它并降低其粘度。 这会产生泥浆，增加发动机摩擦并最终磨损它。

更换机油可为您的发动机提供所需的粘度。 发动机将平稳运行，您永远不会注意到任何爆震声。 此外，普通机油可使发动机保持良好状态，车辆使用寿命更长。 您必须定期更换机油，以免损坏机器。

自动变速箱油

自动变速箱油对于您的车辆正常运行是不可避免的，它是您汽车中最难工作的液体。 变速箱油会随着时间变黑变粘。 每行驶 60,000 至 100,000 英里后，建议更换油液； 否则，您的传输可能会受到影响。 如果您不按时更换液体，您可能需要改造变速箱，费用约为 1500 美元或更多。 为避免这种情况，请始终确保在截止日期前完成。

发动机冷却液

发动机冷却液，也称为防冻剂，有助于在过度工作期间降低发动机温度。 它还可以防止机油在极端冬季结冰。 防冻剂需要更换，因为它会随着时间的流逝而被污染。 建议每 24-36 个月或 38,000 至 58,000 英里更换一次发动机冷却液。 如果您未能更换液体，您的发动机可能会在严冬或因过热而停止运转。

制动液

它也是您车辆中最被低估的液体之一，并且不会像必须的那样经常更换。 您车辆的制动液具有吸湿性，会吸收周围的水分。 制动液中的水会导致结构生锈。 由于空间生锈，可能会发生流体泄漏。 在最坏的情况下，您可能不得不更换车辆的零件。 因此，始终建议每 2 年或 48,000 英里冲洗旧制动液并更换一次。

差动液

差速器是将车辆的驱动轮连接到动力总成的部件。 因此，它承受数千次旋转并产生大量热量。 随着时间的推移，差速器流体可能会失去其粘度并被污染。 如果不及时更换油液，您可能会听到车辆尾部发出巨大的摩擦声和呜呜声。 因此，建议每行驶 48,000 至 96,000 英里更换一次差速器油。

在Auto Approvers预约并获得最好的不良信用汽车贷款。



原文:

Car ownership is more than getting a car. Your vehicle is not only a driving machine for you but also a combination of complex mechanical components. Regular vehicle service and maintenance ensure that your vehicle remains good and will keep all the details in harmony. This article will discuss all the possible risks of not changing your vehicle's oils and fluids.

Engine Oil

The oil is the soul of your engine, and without proper oil, the machine will not work efficiently. The absence of oil will create enormous friction and heat in the engine and ultimately result in its wear and tear. If you do not change the oil, it will break down with time. As the breakdown starts, moisture, fuel and other contaminants dilute it and decrease its viscosity. This can produce a slurry that increases engine friction and ultimately wears it down.

Changing the oil provides the needed viscosity to your engine. The engine will run smoothly, and you will never notice any knocking sound. Moreover, regular oil keeps the engine in good health, and the vehicle will last longer. You must regularly change the engine oil to avoid breaking down your machine.

Automatic Transmission Fluid

Automatic transmission fluids are inevitable for your vehicle to function correctly, and it is the hardest working fluid in your car. The transmission fluid gets dark and sticky with time. After every 60,000 to 100,000 miles, it is recommended to change the fluid; otherwise, your transmission may get affected. If you do not replace the fluid on time, you may need a transmission rebuild, costing around $1500 or more. To avoid this, always make sure to meet the deadline.

Engine Coolant

Engine coolant, also known as antifreeze, helps lower your engine's temperature during excessive working. It also prevents the engine oil from freezing in extreme winters. The antifreeze will need a replacement since it will become contaminated with time. Changing the engine coolant every 24-36 months or 38,000 to 58,000 miles is recommended. If you fail to change the fluid, your engine may stop in extreme winters or due to overheating.

Brake Fluid

It is also one of the most underrated fluids in your vehicle and does not get replaced as often as it must be. Your vehicle's brake fluid is hygroscopic, which absorbs the surrounding moisture. The water in the brake fluid causes rusting of the structure. Due to rusting of the spaces, leaking of the fluid may occur. In the worst cases, you might have to change the parts of your vehicle. Hence, it is always recommended to flush the old brake fluid and change it every 2 years or 48,000 miles.

Differential Fluid

The differential is the component joining your vehicle's drive wheels to the powertrain. Hence, it endures thousands of rotations and generates a lot of heat. With time, the differential fluid may lose its viscosity and become contaminated. If you do not change the fluid in time, you may experience loud noises of grinding and whining from your vehicle's rear end. Therefore, changing the differential fluid after every 48,000 to 96,000 miles is recommended.

Rümeysa Öz for Açıklab

Posted on Apr 28

   
  • Raporların oluşabilmesi için Netex sunucusuna report-base kurulu olması gerekmektedir. Bu linkten yararlanılabilinir.
  • Liman arayüzü açılır.
  • Menüye girilir.
  • Menüde sunucunun alt başlıklarında bulunan NETEX eklentisinin içine girilir.
  • "Machines" sekmesine girilir.
  • Sağda üstte bulunan "İNDİR" butonuna tıklanır.

  • Gelen ekranda üretilen alarmlar "Networks" başlığından istenen networkler filtrelenir ve "Time From" başlığından istenen tarih seçilir.

  • "Create" butonuna tıklanır ve rapor PDF formatında indirilir.

Anurag Vishwakarma - Apr 28

Manthan Ankolekar - Apr 28
